ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft / Reaper) ROKRAT C2 over cloud storage APIs (pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox / Box)
ucs.description: Hunts the hallmark ROKRAT / DOGCALL beaconing pattern where a non-browser process on a host beacons to legitimate cloud storage REST APIs (api.pcloud.com, cloud-api.yandex.net, api.dropboxapi.com, upload.box.com) for command retrieval and exfiltration — the signature C2 channel APT37 has reused since at least 2016 and across the 2021 InkySquid/BLUELIGHT, 2022 ROKRAT, and 2023 M2RAT campaigns.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_host IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","upload.box.com","api.box.com")) by host All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.dest_host _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`
| rex field=process "(?<proc_lower>[^\\\\\/]+)$"
| eval proc_lower=lower(proc_lower)
| where NOT match(proc_lower,"(?i)^(chrome|msedge|firefox|brave|iexplore|opera|safari|onedrive|dropbox|googledrivesync|yandex.disk|boxdrive|pcloud)\\.exe$")
| stats sum(count) as conn_count dc(dest_host) as distinct_cloud_apis values(dest_host) as cloud_apis sum(bytes_out) as bytes_out earliest(firstTime) as firstTime latest(lastTime) as lastTime by host user proc_lower
| where conn_count >= 5
| convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
| sort - distinct_cloud_apis - bytes_out
ucs.kql:
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","upload.box.com","api.box.com"]);
let KnownClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe","safari.exe","onedrive.exe","dropbox.exe","googledrivesync.exe","yandex.disk.exe","box.exe","boxdrive.exe","pcloud.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","HttpConnectionInspected","ConnectionAttempt")
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| where RemoteUrl has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (KnownClients)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            DistinctApis = dcount(RemoteUrl),
            ApisSeen = make_set(RemoteUrl, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine),
            SampleFolder = any(InitiatingProcessFolderPath),
            SampleSHA = any(InitiatingProcessSHA256)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where ConnCount >= 5      // 5+ beacons in 7d to a non-browser process
| order by DistinctApis desc, ConnCount desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","upload.box.com","api.box.com"]);
let KnownClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe","safari.exe","onedrive.exe","dropbox.exe","googledrivesync.exe","yandex.disk.exe","box.exe","boxdrive.exe","pcloud.exe"]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DvcAction in ("Allow","Allowed","") or isempty(DvcAction)
| where isnotempty(Url) or isnotempty(DstHostname)
| extend Host = coalesce(DstHostname, tostring(parse_url(Url).Host))
| where Host has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
| extend ProcName = tolower(tostring(split(ActingProcessName,"\\")[-1]))
| where ProcName !in~ (KnownClients)
| where SrcUsername !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            DistinctApis = dcount(Host),
            ApisSeen = make_set(Host, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleCmd = any(ActingProcessCommandLine)
            by DvcHostname, SrcUsername, ProcName
| where ConnCount >= 5
| order by DistinctApis desc, ConnCount desc
ucs.rationale: ROKRAT, DOGCALL, CORALDECK, BLUELIGHT and M2RAT — the entire APT37 implant family — uniformly use legitimate cloud storage REST APIs as bidirectional C2 instead of attacker-owned infrastructure (Cisco Talos 2017, Volexity 2021, AhnLab 2023). The combination of those four specific cloud providers (especially Yandex.Disk and pCloud, which are nearly unused by Western enterprises) being contacted fro

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 weaponised HWP/HWPX document spawning script-host child (Hangul Word Processor → mshta/powershell/regsvr32)
ucs.description: Detects malicious Hancom Office (HWP / HWPX) lures — APT37's signature initial-access vector against South Korean victims, defectors and journalists since Group123 — when the Hancom binary (Hwp.exe / Hword.exe / Hcell.exe / gbb.exe EPS filter) spawns a script interpreter or LOLBin, which is the execution stage that drops ROKRAT or RoKRAT-shellcode loaders.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_hash) as child_hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("Hwp.exe","hwp.exe","Hword.exe","hword.exe","Hcell.exe","hcell.exe","Hshow.exe","hshow.exe","gbb.exe","GBB.exe")) (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","msiexec.exe")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process_id Processes.parent_process_id
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where NOT match(user,"(?i).*\\$$")
| convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
| sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let HancomParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","gbb.exe","haminc.exe"]);
let SuspectChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","msiexec.exe","explorer.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (HancomParents)
| where FileName in~ (SuspectChildren)
// explorer.exe is a child only when launched with a non-empty cmdline pointing at a downloaded payload
| where not(FileName =~ "explorer.exe" and isempty(ProcessCommandLine))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage  = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessLogonId
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let HancomParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","gbb.exe","haminc.exe"]);
let SuspectChildren = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","msiexec.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User"
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName,"\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,"\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (HancomParents)
| where ChildLeaf in (SuspectChildren)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, ParentLeaf,
          NewProcessName, ChildLeaf,
          CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft - Hancom Office Spawning Script Host or LOLBin
id: 6f7b3a2d-9c4e-4d8f-b3a1-2c8e7f4a1b9d
status: experimental
description: Detects Hancom Office (HWP/HWPX) processes spawning script interpreters or LOLBins — APT37's signature initial-access execution stage delivering ROKRAT/RoKRAT loaders against Korean-language targets.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/korea-in-the-crosshairs/
  - https://www.volexity.com/blog/2021/08/17/north-korean-apt-inkysquid-infects-victims-using-browser-exploits/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/08
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1203
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\Hwp.exe'
      - '\Hword.exe'
      - '\Hcell.exe'
      - '\Hshow.exe'
      - '\gbb.exe'
      - '\Haminc.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\hh.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\msiexec.exe'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child
falsepositives:
  - Hancom support macros that legitimately call cmd.exe (rare)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Hancom Office is the dominant office suite in South Korea and largely unused outside the peninsula — APT37 is the threat actor that has weaponised HWP/HWPX as its primary initial-access vector for over a decade (Cisco Talos Group123, Kaspersky ScarCruft, AhnLab Reaper). Hancom binaries (hwp.exe / hword.exe / gbb.exe EPS filter — the latter abused via CVE-2017-8291-style PostScript exploits) almost
